summary: Iteration 60: Branch Transfer Notification Workflow - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (2 skipped as expected due to stock request being processed). Frontend: All notification navigation flows verified working correctly.

NOTIFICATION_BELL.dropdown_opens_on_click: PASS - Shows notification list with 51 new count
NOTIFICATION_BELL.view_links_present: PASS - Found 14 'View →' links for navigable notifications

NOTIFICATION_CLICK_NAVIGATION.branch_stock_request_to_requests_tab: PASS - Clicking 'IPIL BRANCH requested' notification navigates to /branch-transfers with Stock Requests tab active
NOTIFICATION_CLICK_NAVIGATION.transfer_incoming_to_incoming_tab: PASS - Clicking 'is on the way' notification navigates to /branch-transfers with Incoming tab active
NOTIFICATION_CLICK_NAVIGATION.transfer_variance_review_to_outgoing_tab: PASS - Clicking 'discrepancy' notification navigates to /branch-transfers with Outgoing tab active

URL_DEEP_LINKING.url_params_cleanup: PASS - Params removed from URL after being applied (replace: true)

STOCK_REQUESTS_TAB.tab_visible_in_history: PASS - Stock Requests tab with badge count (1) visible
STOCK_REQUESTS_TAB.test_request_displayed: PASS - PO-20260226104756-9AC1 from IPIL BRANCH shown with items, date, notes, status
STOCK_REQUESTS_TAB.generate_transfer_button: PASS - 'Generate Transfer' button visible, later shows 'Transfer In Progress' after processing

GENERATE_TRANSFER_WORKFLOW.pre_fills_form: PASS - Clicking 'Generate Transfer' switches to New Transfer tab
GENERATE_TRANSFER_WORKFLOW.from_branch_set: PASS - Main Branch - Downtown pre-selected as source (supply_branch)
GENERATE_TRANSFER_WORKFLOW.toast_notification: PASS - Shows 'Transfer pre-filled from PO-20260226104756-9AC1! Set pricing and send.'

BACKEND_API_TESTS.GET_incoming_requests_200: PASS - Returns requests array with total count
BACKEND_API_TESTS.incoming_requests_structure: PASS - Contains id, po_number, po_type='branch_request', items, supply_branch_id
BACKEND_API_TESTS.GET_notifications_200: PASS - Returns notifications array with unread_count
BACKEND_API_TESTS.notification_structure: PASS - Contains id, type, message, created_at

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.js correctly implements TYPE_ICONS with appropriate icons for all transfer notification types
NOTIFICATION_ROUTES mapping correctly maps notification types to deep-link URLs
handleNotificationClick properly checks route existence before navigating, marks notification as read
BranchTransferPage.js useSearchParams hook correctly reads tab/subtab from URL on mount
URL params cleanup (replace: true) prevents stale navigation state
Backend /incoming-requests endpoint correctly filters by supply_branch_id
Backend /generate-branch-transfer validates po_type and status before conversion

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 passed, 2 skipped - expected due to processed request)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all notification navigation and deep-link tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test stock request: PO-20260226104756-9AC1 from IPIL BRANCH
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified the branch-to-branch stock request workflow notification navigation. The NotificationBell component now includes TYPE_ICONS for transfer-related notifications (branch_stock_request, transfer_incoming, transfer_variance_review, transfer_accepted, transfer_disputed) and NOTIFICATION_ROUTES mapping for navigation. Clicking notifications correctly navigates to /branch-transfers with the appropriate tab/subtab selected via URL params. The Stock Requests tab shows incoming requests with Generate Transfer button. URL deep-linking (?tab=history&subtab=requests) works correctly and params are cleaned up after navigation.
